steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The phrase “revealing shifts in norms, values, and concerns” is the crucial clue. It describes ephemeral objects as things that expose or demonstrate cultural change—the central function attributed to them.

steps.title: Match to the answer
steps.content:
An “index” means a sign or indicator. In “indices of cultural change,” these objects are markers that point to shifts in culture. A, B, and D misrepresent this relationship by offering alternatives, speculation, or false pretenses instead of actual indicators.

This matches choice C — C is correct.
